name: Mississippi Mud Cake 3
recipeIngredient: 3 Cups Miniature Marshmallows (or Large Marshmallows cut into 1/2-inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. To prepare the cake batter, combine butter and sugar in a mixing bowl. Beat until creamy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
4. Sift together flour and cocoa powder. Fold into the creamed mixture.
5. Add chopped pecans and vanilla. Beat well.
6. Butter bottom and sides of 9 x 13 inch baking pan. Coat with a little flour, shake to distribute, then shake out excess.
7. Pour batter into pan and bake for 25-30 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and sprinkle marshmallows on top. Return to oven for an additional 10 minutes until marshmallows are melted and lightly browned.
9. Let cool in the pan for about 30 minutes.
6. Prepare icing by melting butter in a saucepan.
7. Sift together confectioner's sugar and cocoa powder. Stir into butter with nuts and evaporated milk.
8. Spread over cooled cake and allow to set completely before serving.
9. Cut into slices and serve.
